Integrations

Everything You Need to Ship Faster

Powerful tools designed for modern teams who demand excellence.

Lightning Fast

Sub-50ms response times globally with our edge-first architecture and intelligent caching.

Enterprise Security

SOC 2 Type II certified with end-to-end encryption, SSO, and granular access controls.

Team Collaboration

Real-time editing, threaded comments, and smart notifications keep everyone in sync.

Advanced Analytics

Deep insights into team performance, project health, and resource allocation.

Time Tracking

Automated time logging with smart suggestions and billable hours reporting.

Custom Workflows

Build automated pipelines with our visual workflow editor and 150+ integration connectors.

Loved by Teams Everywhere

See what our customers have to say about their experience.

★★★★★

Nexus transformed how our team operates. The integrations are seamless and the analytics give us insights we never had before. Highly recommended for any growing team.

SK
Sarah Kim
VP of Engineering, TechCorp
★★★★★

This product changed everything... We moved our entire workflow to Nexus in under a week. The migration tools made it painless and the team adopted it instantly.

Marcus Rodriguez
CTO, StartupXYZ
★★★★★

The customer support is outstanding. Any time we had a question, the team responded within minutes. The platform itself is incredibly polished and reliable.

Product Lead, DesignHub

Uptime
< 50ms
Avg Response
10M+
Users Served
45
Data Centers

Our globally distributed infrastructure ensures your data is always close to your users. With redundant systems across 45 data centers, we guarantee industry-leading reliability and performance for teams of all sizes.

Simple, Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees. Cancel anytime. Start with a 14-day free trial.

Starter
$19/mo
Perfect for small teams getting started
  • Up to 5 team members
  • 10 GB storage
  • Basic analytics
  • Email support
Professional
$49/mo
For growing teams that need more power
  • Up to 25 team members
  • 100 GB storage
  • Advanced analytics
  • Priority support
  • Custom integrations
Enterprise
$99/mo
Unlimited scale for large organizations
  • Unlimited team members
  • 1 TB storage
  • Custom analytics
  • Dedicated support
  • SLA guarantee
  • On-premise option
